title: Creamy Calamarata Pasta Bake
description: A comforting Italian dish made with calamarata pasta, a blend of creamy cheeses, and a hint of garlic.

ingredients.name: Gentle Italian cheese blend
ingredients.notes: mix of mozzarella, parmesan, and ricotta

instructions: Cook the calamarata pasta according to the package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Stir in the gentle Italian cheese blend until well combined.
Add the cooked calamarata pasta to the skillet and toss with the cheese mixture until coated.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with additional grated cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped fresh basil leaves and serve hot.
